headline: Why Alibaba Just Got Hit With A Record $2.87 Billion Fine In China
summary: The regulatory troubles that have beset Jack Ma since November may be nearing their end, culminating in a hefty fine slapped on the Chinese tech entrepreneur's biggest brand.

headline: 6 Pet Stocks And An ETF For National Pet Day
summary: National Pet Day was created in 2006 to bring awareness to adopting and spoiling pets. The holiday takes place every year on April 11.

headline: Why PayPal Is Winning The Fintech War
summary: PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: PYPL) is a global online platform that serves both consumers (PayPal and Venmo) and merchants (Braintree and iZettle), commanding a powerful network effect. PayPal's 348 million consumers attract more merchants, while 29 million merchants add better service for consumers.

headline: Intel Unleashed: A 180-Degree Turn
summary: In the Intel Unleashed: Engineering the Future event in late March, Intel Corporation's (NASDAQ: INTC) new CEO Pat Gelsinger introduced his plan for Intel, the IDM 2.0 strategy.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Chevron, GM, GE, Peloton And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker, Google's parent and an automotive leader.

headline: Is Now The Time To Buy Stock In American Airlines, Carnival, Tesla Or GE?
summary:
One of the most common questions traders have about stocks is “Why Is It Moving?”

That’s why Benzinga created the Why Is It Moving, or WIIM, feature in Benzinga Pro. WIIMs are a one-sentence description as to why that stock is moving.

headline: Amazon Stock Runs Up Towards Resistance: Technical Levels To Watch
summary: Amazon Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) shares traded higher on Friday. The stock was trending on social media websites, as news spread over the failed union vote at the company's Alabama warehouse.

headline: How Elon Musk Responded To Competitor Nio's 100,000th Vehicle Milestone
summary: NIO Inc. (NYSE: NIO) achieved a  key production milestone  last week, and the feat has elicited appreciation from an unexpected quarter.
